case_title: SEALOGIC INTERNATIONAL, INC. VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,552.55 FILED BY SEALOGIC INTERNATIONAL, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEALOGIC INTERNATIONAL, INC.
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-28-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-07-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **SERVICE WAS MADE TO CORPORATION SERVICE COMPANY/CALIFORNIA CSC-LAWYERS INCORPORATION SERVICE/AGENT** SERVED FEB-01-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-28-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-28-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEALOGIC INTERNATIONAL, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 3/29/12 TO WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION.
REMARK: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON MAY 29, 2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
